name: Smart Public Parking
summary: HalaPark lets you easily find and reserve nearby parking in advance. It offers a seamless digital experience with secure cashless payments and instant booking confirmation. From search to payment, everything is managed in one smoth flow for a fast, simple, and stress-free parking experience.

name: Private Parking Rental
summary: HalaPark helps owners and businesses rent out unused parking spaces for steady income. It provides real-time control of availability, pricing, and access through an easy dashboard. Secure payments and automated bookings ensure smooth, efficient operations.

name: EV Charging
summary: HalaPark offers integrated EV charging for modern electric mobility. Users can easily find and use charging stations while parking. Operators manage availability and usage from a central platform. Smart scheduling and secure payments ensure a simple, efficient experience..

name: Valet On Demand
summary: HalaPark offers a premium valet parking service for users and businesses. Customers can instantly request pickup, parking, and return. It ensures smooth coordination, real-time tracking, and secure vehicle handling. Ideal for hotels, malls, and commercial spaces, it enhances convenience and efficiency..

name: Barrier-Free Parking
summary: A fully automated barrier-free parking system using smart recognition technology. Vehicles enter and exit without tickets or barriers through real-time identification and digital validation. It ensures fast, secure access while reducing congestion and improving traffic flow for users and operators.

name: Parking Management
summary: A complete parking management solution with real-time monitoring, dynamic pricing, and automated bookings. Centralized dashboards and analytics provide full visibility into occupancy, revenue, and performance. It streamlines operations, reduces manual effort, and improves efficiency across all facilities.

name: Airport Services
summary: HalaPark offers seamless airport mobility solutions for passengers and visitors. It provides convenient terminal parking, fast drop-off and pick-up, and optional valet support. Users can pre-book spaces, reduce waiting time, and enjoy smooth, hassle-free airport access.

name: Car Wash Services (Interior & Exterior)
summary: On-demand car wash services for interior and exterior cleaning at parking locations or service zones. It includes washing, polishing, vacuuming, anddeep cleaning for a full vehicle refresh. Fast, eco-friendly, and efficient, itimproves vehicle appearance and hygiene while saving time.

name: Air Tyre Service
summary: On-demand tyre inflation and pressure-check service that ensures optimal tyre performance, safety, and fuel efficiency without needing a workshop visit. Available at parking hubs and through mobile support units, it provides quick and convenient assistance while helping maintain vehicle safety and extend tyre lifespan..

name: Battery Replacement Service
summary: Fast on-demand battery replacement service to keep vehicles running without delays. Available at parking facilities and service zones, it offers quick diagnosis and safe installation. Fully integrated with smart parking for convenient and efficient mobility support.
